name: DCS Dolch
description: DCS Dolch — classic Dolch colorway (dark grey alphas, light grey mods) in DCS profile by Signature Plastics, designed by cartersrush; running June 1–July 1 2026 via Divinikey (NA), Prototypist (UK), Keebsupply and DeltakeyCo (EU), and six other regional vendors. Base kit $119–$128 MOQ-tiered; estimated October 2026 ship.
